text: Stepping through the tilting corridors and glass, I sense a liminality—a place between motion and stillness, thought and creation. The 'R+D' wall ahead promises innovation and inquiry. I feel invigorated, filled with curiosity about the synergy of humans and machines, and also a tad disoriented by the unfamiliar angles and interplay of reflection and containment. My mind wants to linger, to absorb the questions this environment asks of me and of itself.
